response.justification: The candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer with strong breadth across web, mobile, and embedded work, but the resume shows only ~6 months of C++ experience (National Instruments, 2007–2008) plus a bachelor thesis project. The role requires 8 years of C++ and significant large-scale cloud compute platform experience, neither of which is demonstrated. Primary languages are TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. While there is some distributed/high-throughput exposure at Sociomantic and platform-building experience via GISCollective, the core technical requirements are not met.
strengths: Long career with senior/staff-level roles and mentoring via workshops, dojos, and courses
Some distributed/high-throughput systems exposure at Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Founder-level ownership of a Kubernetes-deployable open-source platform (GISCollective)
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience, far short of the 8-year minimum
No demonstrated large-scale cloud compute platform or production cloud architecture work
No formal tech-lead title or evidence of leading a cloud/DevOps engineering team at the required scale

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform experience
Senior tenure and mentoring track record
